mapper.insert: INSERT INTO v_ideology_value (id, vname, course_id, parent_id, leaf, level, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id},'未命名节点',#{courseId},NULL,0,1,NOW(),NOW());

INSERT INTO v_ideology_value (id, vname, course_id, parent_id, leaf, level, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id},'未命名节点',#{ideologyValue.courseId},#{ideologyValue.parentId},#{ideologyValue.leaf},#{ideologyValue.level},NOW(),NOW());

INSERT INTO v_ideology_value (id, vname, course_id, parent_id, leaf, level, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id},'未命名节点',#{ideologyValue.courseId},#{ideologyValue.id},1,#{ideologyValue.level},NOW(),NOW());
mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id AS parentId, vname, remark, course_id AS courseId, leaf, level, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM v_ideology_value WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY level ASC, parent_id ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, parent_id AS parentId, vname, remark, course_id AS courseId, leaf, level, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM v_ideology_value WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, parent_id AS parentId, vname, remark, course_id AS courseId, leaf, level, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM v_ideology_value WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND level = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO v_ideology_value (id, vname, remark, course_id, parent_id, leaf, level, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.vname}, #{item.remark}, #{item.courseId}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.leaf}, #{item.level}, NOW(), NOW())
